title: Day 7 Lesson 1 ( Video )Asking someone-s birthday
html:
Day 7 - Lesson 1

たんじょうび を きく (tanjoobi o kiku) = Asking someone's birthday

ばしょ (Location): がっこう　(gakkoo) = School

とうじょうじんぶつ (Characters): りんさん りゅうがくせい, やまださん にほんじん (Lin-san ryuugaksee, Yamada-san nihonjin) = Lin-san study abroad student, Yamada-san Japanese person

For the new words in this video, please check the subtitles and refer to the vocabulary section.
